items.title: In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through…
items.content: In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through your changes and flags what a careful reviewer would catch. We've also extended auto mode to Max users, so longer tasks run with fewer interruptions.
items.summary: In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through your changes and flags what a careful reviewer would catch. We've also extended auto mode to Max users, so longer tasks run…

items.title: On the API, a new xhigh effort level between high and max gives you finer control over reasonin…
items.content: On the API, a new xhigh effort level between high and max gives you finer control over reasoning and latency on hard problems. Task budgets (beta) help Claude prioritize work and manage costs across longer runs.
items.summary: On the API, a new xhigh effort level between high and max gives you finer control over reasoning and latency on hard problems. Task budgets (beta) help Claude prioritize work and manage costs across longer runs.

items.title: The redesign also adds an integrated terminal, file editing, HTML and PDF preview, and a faster…
items.content: The redesign also adds an integrated terminal, file editing, HTML and PDF preview, and a faster diff viewer, all in a drag-and-drop layout you can arrange to your preference. Your CLI plugins work exactly as they do on the command line.
items.summary: The redesign also adds an integrated terminal, file editing, HTML and PDF preview, and a faster diff viewer, all in a drag-and-drop layout you can arrange to your preference. Your CLI plugins work exactly as they do on…

items.title: We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop. You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side…
items.content: We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop. You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all. https://t.co/tfkjolVc71
items.summary: We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop. You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all. https://t.co/tfkjolVc71

items.title: Add the advisor tool to your Messages API call. When your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard dec…
items.content: Add the advisor tool to your Messages API call. When your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard decision mid-run, it consults Opus, gets a plan, and continues, all within a single API request.
items.summary: Add the advisor tool to your Messages API call. When your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard decision mid-run, it consults Opus, gets a plan, and continues, all within a single API request.
